back_translation: It is being heard generally that there is sexual immorality among you all, and it is sexual immorality of a kind that does not exist even among the Gentiles — namely, that a certain man has the wife of his father.
And you all are still puffed up! Why do you not rather grieve, so that the one who has done this deed will be removed from among you?

Because as for me — although I am not present with you in body, I am present with you in spirit-mind — I have already passed judgment on the one who has done such a thing as this, just as if I were actually present.
In the (royal) name of our Lord Jesus Christ, when you all are gathered together along with my spirit, with the power of the Lord Jesus our (royal) Lord present —
the act is to deliver such a person over to Satan, in order that the flesh may be destroyed, so that the spirit may receive salvation in the day of the (royal) Lord.
The boasting that you all do is not a good thing. Do you all not know that even a small amount of leaven causes the entire lump of dough to rise?

Sweep out the old leaven completely, in order that you all may be a new lump of dough, according to what you all really are — that is, without leaven; for Christ, who is our Passover, has already been (royally) offered as a sacrifice.
Therefore let us all keep the festival, not with old leaven, nor with the leaven of malice and wickedness, but with unleavened bread of sincerity and of truth.
I had written to you in the previous letter saying: do not associate-mix-with people who commit sexual immorality.
I did not mean people of sexual immorality of this world generally, or greedy people and robbers, or people who worship idols — otherwise you would have to leave this world entirely.

But now I am writing to you all that you should not associate-with anyone who is named as a brother but is a person of sexual immorality, or a greedy person, or a person who worships idols, or a person who reviles, or a drunkard, or a robber. Do not even share a meal with such a person.
For what business is it of mine to pass judgment on the people who are outside? Are you all not the ones who must judge those who are inside?
But as for the people who are outside, God will (royally) judge them. Remove the evil one from among yourselves.
